content: Just as Merriam-Webster defines an agent as any entity that exerts power to produce an effect (not just artificial software agents), the 2025 iteration of ICM curiosity-driven autonomous agents can be reconceptualized to treat biological and chemical pathogenic agents as naturally occurring 'curiosity-driven' agents. Their intrinsic drive to explore and colonize new host environments matches the reward structure of ICM, where novelty itself generates internal 'reward' that fuels further exploration.
